description: Machine-readable selector, URL-parameter, and endpoint map for the adsbexchange-analyst skill. The self-heal loop reads this to know the expected structure and writes corrected values back when ADS-B Exchange changes. Each entry carries a 'verified' date and a 'status': 'verified' (confirmed live on that date), 'documented' (from ADS-B Exchange docs, not click-tested), or 'inferred' (derived from a verified sibling, confirm before relying).

globe.notes: Free, no account. Default surface for historical pulls, snapshot evidence, and KML. Treat as a human-driven UI, not a scrape target. All dates/times are UTC (Zulu).

icao.effect: Center, select, and isolate one aircraft by ICAO hex.

airport.effect: Center the map on an airport by its ICAO code.

showTrace.effect: Load the historical track for the selected aircraft on the given UTC day (YYYY-MM-DD). This is the deep-link for a historical day; the UI sets it when you click History.

zoom.effect: Set zoom level (1-20). May be overridden when icao/showTrace auto-frames.

icaoFilter.effect: Show only the listed aircraft (small fleet watch).

replay.effect: Activate the replay toolbar on the current view (flag).

tempTrails.effect: Show temporary trails for NN seconds of recent history.

SiteLat.effect: Set the viewer location latitude for this visit (range rings).

SiteLon.effect: Set the viewer location longitude for this visit.

heatmap.effect: Draw up to NN history dots (density / departure-arrival heat).

heatDuration.effect: Hours of history to show in the heatmap (default 24).

heatEnd.effect: End the heat window H hours into the past (default 0 = now).

kiosk.effect: Hide ads and buttons, set icon size. Useful for clean snapshots.

hideSidebar.effect: Hide the sidebar chrome for clean snapshots (flag).

hideButtons.effect: Hide the on-map buttons for clean snapshots (flag).

showerrors.effect: Surface errors in the UI (troubleshooting / self-heal).

keyboard_shortcuts.K: track labels and trackpoints (click a trackpoint to update the left-column data)
keyboard_shortcuts.Shift+L: estimated last leg vs full trace

search_input.label: Search:
search_input.desc: Find an aircraft by hex ID, callsign, or registration. name=searchBox.

search_button.label: Search
search_button.desc: Submit the Search box. Has no id; locate by text near #search_input. Pressing Enter in the box also works.

jump_input.label: Jump to Airport or Latitude, Longitude:
jump_input.desc: Frame the map on an airport code (e.g. KAUS) or coordinates. name=jumpBox.

jump_button.label: Jump
jump_button.desc: Submit the Jump box. Has no id; locate by text near #jump_input.

aircraft_infoblock.label: (left aircraft pane)
aircraft_infoblock.desc: Container for the selected aircraft's details. Hidden until an aircraft is selected.

selected_callsign.label: callsign
selected_callsign.desc: Callsign / flight name of the selected aircraft.

selected_icao.label: Hex:
selected_icao.desc: Shows 'Hex: <HEX>' plus the Copy Link permalink anchor.

copy_link.label: Copy Link
copy_link.desc: Permalink anchor; its href is the shareable globe URL for this aircraft (e.g. https://globe.adsbexchange.com/?icao=<hex>). Record it for the case file.

db_flags.label: DB flags:
db_flags.desc: Shows 'none', 'military', 'interesting', 'PIA', or 'LADD'. PIA/LADD mean the aircraft suppresses or anonymizes identity; treat with extra care.

show_trace.label: History
show_trace.desc: Load the historical track for the selected aircraft on the current UTC day. Sets the showTrace=YYYY-MM-DD URL param and reveals the history controls and KML buttons.

hist_date_picker.label: UTC day:
hist_date_picker.desc: Text input holding the historical day in YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Set this to the target date.

trace_back_1d.label: previous
trace_back_1d.desc: Step the UTC day back by one (previous day).

trace_jump_1d.label: next
trace_jump_1d.desc: Step the UTC day forward by one (next day).

leg_prev.label: previous
leg_prev.desc: Step to the previous leg of the day's track (a leg is one takeoff-to-landing segment).

leg_next.label: next
leg_next.desc: Step to the next leg of the day's track.

playback_stop.label: stop
playback_stop.desc: Stop trace playback. Start playback by clicking the trace line on the map.

replay_date_picker.label: (replay date)
replay_date_picker.desc: Date input for the replay toolbar (the replay URL param).

replay_play.label: Play
replay_play.desc: Start replay in the replay toolbar.

filter_callsign.label: (Filters tab) callsign
filter_callsign.desc: Filter the live list by callsign.

filter_registration.label: (Filters tab) registration
filter_registration.desc: Filter the live list by registration.

filter_type.label: (Filters tab) type
filter_type.desc: Filter the live list by ICAO type.

filter_squawk.label: (Filters tab) squawk
filter_squawk.desc: Filter the live list by squawk.

altitude_filter_min.label: (Filters tab) min alt
altitude_filter_min.desc: Filter the live list by minimum altitude.

kml_export.note: The three KML buttons appear in the left pane once a historical track is loaded. Each generates a Google Earth KML via a data:application/vnd.google-earth.kml+xml download. Save the 'baro + avg' variant by default.

export_kml_geom_avg.label: baro + avg.(EGM96 - baro)
export_kml_geom_avg.desc: Barometric altitude corrected by the average EGM96-minus-baro offset; the default, terrain-aligned export. Verified to download N373MM-track-EGM96_avg.kml.

recaptcha.desc: Google reCAPTCHA is present on the page (invisible, score-based). It only shows a puzzle if behavior looks robotic. No puzzle appeared during human-paced interaction on 2026-06-15. Never solve or bypass programmatically; apply the run's bot policy.

marketing_popup.desc: A BounceX (bouncex) email-capture overlay sometimes appears and intercepts clicks. This is a marketing popup, NOT a bot challenge; dismiss it with the close button (or call bouncex.close_ad(<id>)) before interacting. The campaign id digits may change; match by id prefix 'bx-campaign-' and close via the matching 'bx-close-inside-' button.

anti_bot.ads_note: The globe carries a heavy ad/tracking stack (Freestar, Rubicon, Yieldmo, Facebook pixel). For clean court snapshots, use kiosk / hideSidebar / hideButtons params and dismiss the marketing popup.

trace_fetch_recent.desc: Internal trace fetch the globe uses for the recent (last ~24h) track. <XX> = last two hex chars of the ICAO. UNDOCUMENTED, may be rate-limited or ToS-gated. Prefer the official API. Do NOT build the monitor on this.

trace_fetch_full.desc: Internal trace fetch the globe uses for the full-day track. UNDOCUMENTED, prefer the official API. Do NOT build the monitor on this.

live_api.name: API Lite / Personal Use Aircraft Data API (via RapidAPI)
live_api.purpose: Live last-known position only. No date parameter. Used for live tracking and the monitor/notify loop.

hex.summary: Get last known position by ICAO hex.

icao.summary: Get aircraft by ICAO hex. Comma-separate for multiple; append a trailing comma to force a collection response for a single aircraft.

radius.summary: Get aircraft within {dist} nautical miles of a lat/lon. Useful to confirm presence near an airport.

airport.summary: Get aircraft near an airport by code.

response.note: Parse data['ac']. Older docs call the array 'aircraft'; the gateway v2 response uses 'ac'. Send Accept-Encoding: gzip; access fields by name; tolerate new additive fields.

pricing.summary: About 10 USD per month for roughly 10,000 requests; no standard free tier. A data feeder may get the fee waived. Enterprise API is the commercial tier. Verify current tiers on RapidAPI.

trace_archive.purpose: Date-addressable daily trace files for older or bulk historical data. Opt-in upgrade; not the default. Paid subscription (annual) beyond the public sample.
trace_archive.protocol: Amazon S3-compatible (Cloudflare R2). Use rclone or aws-cli.

sample_bucket.name: adsbx-sample-data
sample_bucket.note: These are ADS-B Exchange's PUBLISHED public sample credentials (open to everyone for test/demo). Layout example: readsb-hist/YYYY/MM/DD/HHMMSSZ.json.gz. Use this free path to build and test the historical workflow without a subscription.

recent_buckets.desc: Roughly the last 90 days, updated in real time.

yearly_buckets.desc: Older data keyed by year (replace YYYY).

samples_host.desc: Documented public sample path for hi-res traces. Confirm live before relying; the R2 adsbx-sample-data bucket is the verified free path.

trace_file_format.summary: { icao, timestamp(s), trace: [ [secondsAfterTimestamp, lat, lon, alt(ft|'ground'|null), gs(kt|null), track(deg|null), flagsBitfield, vrate(fpm|null), aircraftDetails|null, type|null, geomAlt|null, geomVrate|null, ias|null, roll|null], ... ] }. flags bit 2 (value & 2) marks the start of a new leg.

terms.summary: Data is licensed for personal/non-profit research, non-profit education, or internal testing/evaluation. Commercial use requires written permission from ADS-B Exchange. Citation required for publications: 'ADSBexchange, http://www.ADSBexchange.com'. Respect robots.txt, throttle, and back off on 403/429.

heal_log_hint: When a step that should succeed fails, diagnose against this map, re-derive the selector/param/endpoint, retry (up to 5 attempts), and on success update the matching entry here with the new value and today's date. Append a short note to heal-log.md in the working folder.
